welcomeMessage: Welcome to Calvary Chapel Antelope Valley! So glad you are joining us this week.

scripture.verse: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.

announcements.title: Good Friday Service
announcements.body: Join us Friday April 18th at 7:00 PM for a special Good Friday remembrance service.

events.title: Palm Sunday
events.description: We celebrated Jesus' triumphal entry into Jerusalem.
